## OpenSpec change

<!-- Every non-trivial PR implements an approved OpenSpec change. See CONTRIBUTING.md -->

- Change: <!-- link to openspec/changes/<name>/ (or the PR that approved it) -->
- [ ] Proposal + specs were approved by a teammate **before** implementation started
- [ ] `tasks.md` checkboxes reflect what this PR actually does

**OR**

- [ ] Trivial-fix exemption: typo / docs-only / formatting — no behavior change

## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences; the spec change carries the detail -->
